CustomField.description: Notes to explain the "Utilities" field amount (date, who determined it, how it was calculated, if we are ignoring to broaden outreach, etc.). This field does not appear on listings.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Notes to explain the "Utilities" field amount (date, who determined it, how it was calculated, if we are ignoring to broaden outreach, etc.). This field does not appear on listings.
CustomField.label: Utilities Comments
